tasks.subject: Task 0: Add a UI pass to the frame profiler + overlay field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The existing $details overlay shows a `U:` millisecond field measuring total UI submission, alongside the current T/O/C/I/E.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/source/Core/Utilities/FrameProfiler.h:17-30 (add `UI` to enum + kPassNames)
- Modify: src/source/Scenes/MainScene.cpp:530-559 (wrap RenderMainSceneUI in FRAME_PROFILE(UI))
- Modify: src/source/Scenes/SceneManager.cpp:570-577 (add U:%5.2f field reading FP::UI)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- FrameProfiler::Pass has a UI slot; kPassNames length == (int)Pass::Count_ (compile-time check)
- RenderMainSceneUI() wrapped in FRAME_PROFILE(UI)
- Overlay Frame ms line shows U:%5.2f reading FrameProfiler::AccumulatorMs(FP::UI)
- U: ~0 with everything closed, rises with inventory/stats open

**Verify:** cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug; launch via I:\MuOnline\launch_client.bat; enable $details overlay -> Frame ms line ends with U: x.xx

**Steps:** add UI enum slot + name; add FRAME_PROFILE(UI) as first stmt of RenderMainSceneUI; extend swprintf format+args at SceneManager.cpp:571; build (wrong array len fails); visual verify; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Core/Utilities/FrameProfiler.h", "src/source/Scenes/MainScene.cpp", "src/source/Scenes/SceneManager.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Pass::UI slot added, kPassNames length == Count_", "RenderMainSceneUI wrapped in FRAME_PROFILE(UI)", "overlay shows U:%5.2f from FP::UI", "U: ~0 closed, >0 with windows open"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: UiStats counters + ghost-update trace + overlay line
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Overlay reports per frame: total NewUI windows, updated, rendered, updated-while-hidden (ghosts), and text draw/raster counts; a debug build logs each ghost-updating window's class name (whitelist source for Task 2).

**Files:**
- Create: src/source/UI/NewUI/UiStats.h (header-only counters, mirrors FrameProfiler)
- Modify: src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIManager.cpp:182-216 (Update/Render counters + typeid ghost trace)
- Modify: src/source/UI/Legacy/UIControls.cpp (RenderText ~2624 textDraws++, UploadText ~2751 textRasterized++)
- Modify: src/source/Scenes/SceneManager.cpp:578 (print UI line + UiStats::ResetFrame)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- UiStats.h exposes Frame() counters + ResetFrame()
- windowsTotal/Updated/Rendered/ghostUpdates populated by NewUIManager Update/Render
- textDraws per RenderText, textRasterized per UploadText
- Overlay shows 'UI win:.. upd:.. ren:.. ghost:.. text:.. raster:..'; counters reset each frame
- _DEBUG/UI_GHOST_TRACE build prints 'ui-ghost-update: <class>' on open/close inventory

**Verify:** cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug; launch with MU_TEST_CHARS=50 + MU_NOVSYNC; open/close inventory+stats -> overlay ghost: and raster: non-zero; CAPTURE the ui-ghost-update class list for Task 2.

**Steps:** create UiStats.h; add includes (UiStats.h, <typeinfo>) to NewUIManager.cpp; instrument Update (windowsTotal, ghostUpdates+trace, windowsUpdated) and Render (windowsRendered); add textDraws++/textRasterized++ in UIControls.cpp; print UI line + dual reset in SceneManager.cpp; build+run+capture; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/UI/NewUI/UiStats.h", "src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIManager.cpp", "src/source/UI/Legacy/UIControls.cpp", "src/source/Scenes/SceneManager.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UiStats.h Frame()/ResetFrame()/Counters present", "window counters populated in Update/Render", "textDraws/textRasterized populated in GDI path", "overlay UI line prints + resets per frame", "debug build traces ui-ghost-update class names"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Suspend Update() for hidden windows (gated + reversible)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hidden NewUI windows stop running Update() every frame, except a small whitelist (from Task 1) that needs hidden ticks, controlled by a runtime kill-switch (instantly reversible).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIBase.h:24-51 (add virtual bool WantsHiddenUpdate() const { return false; })
- Modify: src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIManager.h:16-27 (extern bool g_bUiSuspendHiddenUpdate)
- Modify: src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIManager.cpp:182-199 (define switch, apply gate)
- Modify: NewUI*Window headers flagged by Task 1's ui-ghost-update log (override WantsHiddenUpdate -> true)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CNewUIObj has virtual bool WantsHiddenUpdate() const { return false; }
- global bool g_bUiSuspendHiddenUpdate (default true) gates it; false restores legacy behavior
- Update runs a window only when IsEnabled() && (!g_bUiSuspendHiddenUpdate || IsVisible() || WantsHiddenUpdate())
- every class from Task 1 ghost trace overrides WantsHiddenUpdate() -> true
- switch on: overlay ghost: drops to whitelist count; U: ms lower vs Task 1 baseline; no regression (chat receives while closed, timers fire, animations intact)

**Verify:** cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug; launch MU_TEST_CHARS=50 + MU_NOVSYNC. A/B: g_bUiSuspendHiddenUpdate=false = baseline (record U:, ghost:); =true = optimized (record again). Optimized U: < baseline, ghost: ~whitelist, chat/whisper/event windows still work closed.

**Steps:** add WantsHiddenUpdate virtual to CNewUIObj; declare extern switch in .h; define switch + apply gate in .cpp; override WantsHiddenUpdate->true per class from Task 1 log (rule: keep true if consumes packets / has timer / plays close anim); build + A/B verify; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIBase.h", "src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIManager.h", "src/source/UI/NewUI/NewUIManager.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WantsHiddenUpdate() virtual on CNewUIObj default false", "g_bUiSuspendHiddenUpdate extern+defined once, default true", "gate = IsEnabled() && (!switch || IsVisible() || WantsHiddenUpdate())", "all Task1 ghost classes overridden true", "A/B: optimized U: < baseline, no functional regression"], "requireABCompare": true}
```
